description: Style Note Add a desi dimension to your global-glam ensemble with this lovely pair of earrings from royal diadem. A statement piece is a fashion essential - style this with minimal additional accessories for maximum effect. This pair packs a definite ethnic punch which means you can use this to dress up a simple salwar suit or a monochrome sari. Invest in this pair and you'll find that the statement jewellery trend will outlast the season. Product Details Golden coloured earringsFlower shaped base with white beaded detail surrounding a green coloured stone in the centre Rounded conical shaped dangler with pearl like beads on it and green inlays on top and white pearl like beads and a green tear drop shaped stone hanging from the bottom White pearl like beads hanging from the intersectionPush back closure  Material and Care Metal Wipe with a cotton swab to remove dustSizeLength: 92 mm
